news.summary: Intellia Therapeutics, Inc., a prominent clinical-stage gene editing company listed on NASDAQ as NTLA, reported three-year follow-up data on June 15, 2025. The data was derived from the Phase 1 segment of an ongoing Phase 1/2 trial involving patients with HAE who were treated with a single dose of lonvoguran ziclumeran (also called lonvo-z or NTLA-2002). The results were presented at the European Academy of Allergy and Clinical Immunology (EAACI) Congress 2025 in Glasgow, United Kingdom, which took place from June 13-16.
news.headline: Intellia Therapeutics reports positive 3-year data from HAE trial at EAACI Congress. Lonvo-z (NTLA-2002) shows promise.

news.summary: On June 15, 2025, a prominent renewable energy solutions provider, Scatec ASA, entered into a 25-year Power Purchase Agreement (PPA) valued at USD for a 900 MW wind project with the Egyptian Electricity Transmission Company (EETC). This agreement was made through their specialized project entity, “Shadwan Wind Power SAE,” aiming to fast-track Egypt's shift towards a more environmentally friendly and sustainable energy composition.
news.headline: Scatec signs PPA for 900MW onshore wind project in Egypt with EETC for 25 years, aiding Egypt's sustainable energy plan.

news.headline: Scatec secures financial close for 1.1GW solar + 100MW/200MWh BESS Obelisk project in Egypt. Oslo/Cairo, 15 June 2025.

news.summary: In Innsbruck, Austria on June 15, 2025, Andreas Clementi, the CEO and founder of AV-Comparatives, emphasized the importance of effective detection in light of evolving cyberattacks. He introduced the 2025 EDR/XDR Certification as a tool for CISOs to evaluate the efficiency of their cybersecurity tools in identifying subtle, genuine threats. This certification aims to provide a comprehensive assessment rather than a mere checkbox approach.
news.headline: AV-Comparatives CEO Andreas Clementi announces 2025 EDR/XDR Certification for CISOs to detect real-world threats effectively.

news.summary: Last week, eleven large-cap stocks underperformed, with The J. M. Smucker Company (NYSE: SJM) stock dropping by 13.67% due to mixed fourth-quarter financial results and a fiscal year 2026 EPS guidance below expectations, leading to analysts lowering their price forecasts. Chewy, Inc. (NYSE: CHWY) stock also fell by 13.57% as the company issued a lower-than-expected fiscal year 2025 sales outlook despite strong first-quarter earnings, prompting analysts to revise their forecasts downward. The details regarding Samsara Inc. (NYSE: IOT) can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Top 11 large cap losers last week include J. M. Smucker Co. (NYSE: SJM) down by 13.67% and Chewy, Inc. (NYSE: CHWY) down by 13.57%.

news.summary: In Neptune City, N.J., Nylabone, a well-known brand under Central Garden & Pet (NASDAQ: CENT) (NASDAQ: CENTA), is introducing a new product to their Nubz® dog treat line. The Nubz® Flavor Bursts chew treats are made with real cheddar cheese and bacon flavor, designed to enhance the snacking experience for dogs. These natural chew treats contain savory flavor bursts thanks to innovative technology. This launch comes just in time for summer, adding more excitement to treat time for canine companions.
news.headline: Nylabone introduces Nubz Flavor Bursts chew treats, adding cheddar cheese and bacon flavors to the popular Nubz dog treat line.

news.summary: Celebrating five years of promoting road safety for drivers and vehicle owners, Redtiger announces the launch of its #BrakeForGood campaign in honor of its anniversary. news.headline: Redtiger marks 5 years of top-selling dash cams with discounts and giveaways for #BrakeForGood campaign.

news.summary: Individuals who possess Bitcoin are utilizing crypto-backed loans to purchase real estate, without needing to sell their BTC. This allows them to avoid capital gains taxes, while also maintaining exposure to potential price increases in Bitcoin.
news.headline: Crypto-rich are using Bitcoin as collateral for loans, entering real estate market without selling BTC, avoiding capital gains taxes.

news.summary: Top surveillance companies are utilizing Zilliz Cloud to address data overload issues, allowing for immediate threat identification and quick video retrieval within corporate setups. The organization Zilliz has unveiled this innovative solution in REDWOOD SHORES, California on June 15, 2025. This development marks a significant advancement in the industry, with companies benefiting from seamless real-time threat detection and video search capabilities in under a second.
news.headline: Zilliz revolutionizes video surveillance with AI Vector Database, aiding real-time threat detection.

news.summary: In the last week, the crypto industry experienced significant developments. Coinbase Global Inc. (NASDAQ: COIN) played a central role, as it became the first crypto exchange to join the S&P 500 index, marking a milestone in mainstream acceptance of cryptocurrencies. This move highlights Coinbase's position among the largest and most influential companies in the U.S. Another key event was the SEC appointing a crypto expert, Jamie Selway, to a leadership role, emphasizing a shift towards crypto-savvy regulation. Additionally, Coinbase's CEO discussed the potential end of the fiat era, indicating a shifting landscape in the financial world. These stories demonstrate the increasing integration and impact of cryptocurrencies in traditional markets.
news.headline: Coinbase makes history in S&P 500 debut, SEC appoints crypto insider - week in crypto summarized.

news.summary: According to recent data, the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.6%, the lowest it has been in over a decade. The economy also saw a growth of 5.2% in the last quarter, surpassing expectations. Additionally, the stock market reached an all-time high, with the major indexes increasing by 8% on average. Experts predict continued growth in the upcoming months, with projections of a 6% increase in GDP for the next year. The positive outlook has led to an increase in consumer confidence, with spending up by 12% compared to last year. Overall, the economic indicators point towards a strong and thriving economy.
news.headline: Cancel California's high-speed rail project: Bloomberg.

news.summary: In 2025, individuals can stake Solana (SOL) by utilizing a compatible wallet such as Phantom. To do so, they must select a validator and then delegate their SOL. This process can be completed with just a few clicks, simplifying the staking process for users.
news.headline: In 2025, beginners can stake Solana by using Phantom wallet, selecting a validator, and delegating SOL in a few clicks.

news.summary: New data presented at the European Academy of Allergy and Clinical Immunology Conference (EACCI) demonstrates a heightened potency mechanism with Verekitug, a new antibody antagonist of the Thymic Stromal Lymphopoietin (TSLP) receptor. The findings reveal a significant increase in effectiveness of Verekitug compared to existing treatments for allergies and clinical immunology. This novel antagonist has shown promise in inhibiting allergic reactions by targeting the TSLP receptor. These results provide insight into potential advancements in allergy treatment, with Verekitug showing great promise in enhancing therapeutic outcomes in this field.
news.headline: Translational data at EACCI show Verekitug, a TSLP receptor antibody, is more potent.

news.summary: Recently listed on the New York Stock Exchange, the CEO of Circle foresees stablecoins gaining developer interest similar to the iPhone's popularity. The company's debut on the stock exchange marks a significant milestone in the industry's evolution. The CEO is optimistic about the future growth of stablecoin adoption and believes it will soon reach levels comparable to the widespread appeal of the iPhone among developers. This highlights the increasing importance of stablecoins in the digital currency market, reflecting a promising trend for the industry.
news.headline: Circle CEO predicts stablecoins will soon reach iPhone-level popularity, after debuting on NYSE.

news.summary: Vietnam recently enacted a comprehensive digital technology law that officially recognizes crypto assets and provides support for various industries. The law includes provisions that offer benefits for the development of AI, semiconductors, and infrastructure. This move is expected to significantly boost innovation and economic growth in the country.
news.headline: Vietnam legalizes cryptocurrency under new tech law, also offering incentives for AI, semiconductors, and infrastructure.

news.summary: In the latest news recap, several significant stories emerged this week. One of them involved Mark Cuban endorsing Rep. Ro Khanna's Progressive Deficit Reduction Plan, which aims to reduce the U.S. deficit by $12 trillion in the next ten years, with a major focus on spending cuts. The plan was revealed on June 10, 2025, and sets a target of lowering the deficit-to-GDP ratio to 3% by 2034, below the usual 3.8% average. Additionally, the World Economic Forum issued a troubling forecast on gender equality. President Trump approved a substantial steel merger, while Elon Musk made predictions about a future with fewer jobs.
news.headline: Mark Cuban endorses Ro Khanna's plan to reduce US deficit by $12 trillion over the decade, aiming for a 3% deficit-to-GDP ratio by 2034.

news.summary: A recent report stated that the global economy is projected to grow by 5.6% in 2021, higher than the 4% predicted earlier. The United States economy is expected to expand by 6.2%, while China's economy is forecasted to grow by 8.4%. These figures indicate a strong recovery from the economic downturn caused by the COVID-19 pandemic. The report also highlighted the importance of ongoing vaccination efforts in sustaining this growth trajectory. The International Monetary Fund has revised its global growth forecast, underscoring the resilience and potential for recovery in the world economy.
news.headline: Stock markets in Israel and Saudi Arabia dropped amid escalating conflict in the Middle East.
